endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/operations
endpoints.description: Returns the list of available operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults
endpoints.description: Fetches all the resources of the specified type in the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name:
API to check for resource name availability.
A name is available if no other resource exists that has the same SubscriptionId, Resource Name and Type
or if one or more such resources exist, each of these must be GC'd and their time of deletion be more than 24 Hours Ago
endpoints.description:
API to check for resource name availability.
A name is available if no other resource exists that has the same SubscriptionId, Resource Name and Type
or if one or more such resources exist, each of these must be GC'd and their time of deletion be more than 24 Hours Ago
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a Recovery Services vault.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.
